positive: A minimalist, abstract silhouette of a stylized celestial journey: a pair of glowing hot air balloons ascending through a deep indigo twilight sky, past orbiting crescent moons and gentle nebula clouds. The balloons are rendered in clean, flowing, bioluminescent opal and gold accents. The composition should be centered and balanced, utilizing negative space dramatically. Style: Neo-Art Deco geometric abstraction meets ethereal watercolor wash. Lighting: Soft rim light on the balloon edges, high contrast against the dark sky. Color Palette: Indigo, deep sapphire, shimmering gold, and pearlescent opal. Suitable for single-color screen printing on fabric.
